variants: Specializing in architectural design, Matias Figueroa is known for his innovative approach to integrating light into structures. He possesses Nocturnal Conductor Status, a certification that highlights his expertise in nighttime aesthetics. Under the mentorship of Louise Cormier, Matias refined his skills and found his passion for illuminating environments. He is an active member of the Breezefern Lanternbinders, where he collaborates with others who share his ambition. His work often receives financial support from the Valor Crest Guild, confirming their belief in his creative vision.
